article_meta.title: Politics Here Are The Top 10 Lies Of Liz Cheney And The January 6th Committee By: Tristan Justice January 06, 2025 8 min

reasoning: The model largely flagged genuine bias in the author's own prose and avoided quoting errors, but it missed several major instances (e.g., headline framing 'Top 10 Lies...') and applied a couple of questionable labels. Output formatting also included markdown fences.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: All flagged items are from the author’s prose; no quoted or attributed source language was treated as author bias.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: Flagged passages are clearly loaded/biased author language; only one item (deaths framing) is debatable but still a defensible bias flag.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed several prominent instances: headline’s ‘Top 10 Lies,’ phrases like ‘conspiracy peddled,’ ‘covered up,’ claims about Pelosi violating rules, and other loaded framings.
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: Most labels are reasonable, but at least two are off: the Tourette’s/TDS line fits Mudslinging/Sensationalism more than Unsubstantiated Claims; the deaths sentence labeled as Bias by Omission is debatable and might better fit Slant or not be a bias instance as framed.
